message:
fix(engine): alias star re-exports to target module surface and fix related module-layer test correctness

Resolve star re-exports to the target module's exported surface instead
of the canonical source, correctly preserving renamed upstream re-exports.
Add explicit re-export priority over ambiguous star re-exports.

Fix execution_cell to return CellAlreadyExists on duplicate loads instead
of silently overwriting. Fix module_compatibility_matrix tests to hit the
intended validation path. Fix module_resolver tests to register parent
modules for proper test isolation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
